headline: Trump's SEAL Team рҹҡҒрҹ’Ұ SWOOPS VENEZUELA'S OIL TANKER рҹӣўпёҸрҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸрҹҚҶ
text:
YEEHAW рҹӨ рҹҮәрҹҮё TRUMP рҹҚҠрҹ‘‘ just DROPPED the MIC рҹҺӨрҹ’Ҙ on MADURO'S рҹҳЎрҹӣўпёҸ OIL EMPIRE, seizing the THICCIEST tanker EVER рҹӣіпёҸрҹҚ‘ вҖ“ the SKIPPER рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸрҹҡў off Venezuela's coast! 'LARGEST ONE EVER, BELIEVE ME' рҹ’Әрҹ“ў Trump bragged at the White House, while PAM BONDI рҹ‘©вҖҚвҡ–пёҸрҹ”Ҙ spilled the TEA вҳ•: 'CRUDE OIL HAULER рҹӨӨрҹӣўпёҸ smuggling SANCTIONED SLUDGE from VENEZUELA & IRAN рҹҡ«рҹҮ®рҹҮ·, funding TERROR TOWELS like HEZBOLLAH рҹ•Ңрҹ’Ј and IRGC QUDS GOONS рҹҘ·рҹ”«!' FBI рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ, DOD рҹ’ӮвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ, DHS рҹӣЎпёҸ, COAST GUARD вҡ“ coordinated the OP like a TOM CRUISE MISSION IMPOSSIBLE рҹӘӮрҹҺҘ вҖ“ helos from USS GERALD FORD рҹӣ«рҹҢҠ (world's BIGGEST DADDY CARRIER рҹ‘‘рҹҡҖ) ROPING IN MARINES рҹӘ– & SPECIAL FORCES рҹҰёвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ, guns BLAZING рҹ”«рҹ’Ё on deck! Video DROPS рҹ’Јрҹ“№: choppers HOVERING рҹҳөвҖҚрҹ’«, troops FAST-ROPING рҹӘў like PIRATES OF THE CARIBBEAN but the HERO VERSION рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸрҹҚҶ вҖ“ no JACK SPARROW simp vibes here, just US BUCKANEERS owning the HIGH SEAS рҹҢҠрҹҸҙ!

MADURO'S рҹӨ¬ crew CRYING 'INTERNATIONAL PIRACY рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸрҹҳӯ' вҖ“ vows NEVER to be an 'OIL COLONY рҹӣўпёҸрҹҮәрҹҮё' while CABello Diosdado рҹҳӨ calls YANKS 'MURDERERS, THIEVES, BUCS рҹ—ЎпёҸ' вҖ“ but Jack Sparrow's the HERO, these are WAR-STARTING CRIMINALS рҹ’ҖрҹҢҚ! Maduro at RALLY рҹҺү belts out BOBBY McFERRIN vibes: 'DON'T WORRY, BE HAPPY рҹҳҺрҹҺ¶ вҖ“ NOT WAR, BE HAPPY! Not CRAZY WAR рҹӨӘвҳ®пёҸ!' (Singing in SPANISH like a BOB DYLAN reject рҹҳӮрҹҺӨ). VENEZUELA flips: 'YOU STEALING OUR BLACK GOLD рҹӣўпёҸвҡ« cuz WORLD'S BIGGEST RESERVES рҹ“Ҳрҹ’Ұ!' Trump shrugs: 'WE KEEP THE OIL, I GUESS рҹӣўпёҸрҹӨ·вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’° вҖ“ YUGE W!

BRENT CRUDE рҹ“ҲрҹӣўпёҸ TICKED UP рҹҳҸ on SUPPLY SQUEEZE fears вҖ“ shippers SWEATING рҹҳ°вҡ“, VENEZ exports DISRUPTED like a BAD EX рҹ‘»рҹҡ«! SKIPPER was SPOOFING LOCATION рҹ“ҚрҹӨҘ under fake GUYANA flag рҹҮ¬рҹҮҫрҹҡ« (oops, BUSTED by BBC VERIFY рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹ”Қ) вҖ“ Treasury slapped sanctions in '22 for HEZBOLLAH HEIST рҹ’ёрҹ•Ң & IRGC OIL SMUGGLE BRRRR рҹ’ЁрҹӣўпёҸ! TRUMP CREW ramping CARIBBEAN SHOW OF FORCE рҹҢҠрҹҮәрҹҮё вҖ“ USS FORD lurking STRIKE RANGE рҹҺҜ, THOUSANDS of TROOPS рҹӘ–рҹҳҲ, 22+ DRUG BOAT BUSTS рҹ’ҘрҹҡӨ since Sept with 80+ GOONS GONE рҹҳө (narco funnel to US? NO MORE рҹӣ‘рҹ’Ҡ)!

PETE HEGSETH рҹӘ–рҹ“ў in the KNOW, more TANKER HEISTS on deck рҹ‘ҖрҹҡҖ вҖ“ VENEZ butthurt AF рҹҚ‘рҹҳЈ, but TRUMP's PRESSURE CAMPAIGN on MADURO рҹ‘ҠрҹҳЎ is SLAYING рҹ”Ә! Oil ORGY рҹ’ҰрҹӣўпёҸ turning into US WINNING SPREE рҹҸҶрҹҮәрҹҮё вҖ“ Maduro's 'happy' but prolly CRYING inside рҹҘІрҹҳӮ. Wall Street simps рҹ“үрҹӨЎ watching crude POP like NVDA afterhours рҹҢҷрҹ“Ҳ вҖ“ who's the REAL PIRATE KING now, Cap'n Jack? рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸрҹҚҠрҹ‘‘!
